summary: Attempted to test Profile Save button dirty-tracking and Add Item button rename. Found critical blocking issues preventing complete verification of both features.

critical_bugs.issue: First name input field not found after expanding Identity accordion. Tried selectors: [data-testid='profile-field-first_name'] and input[id='f-first'] as specified in code line 378, but neither element exists in DOM.
critical_bugs.impact: Cannot test Profile Save button dirty-tracking functionality. The input field that should trigger dirty state is not accessible.

critical_bugs.issue: Cannot access /add route - all navigation attempts (direct URL, clicking from Closet) redirect to /home. Route appears to be protected or non-existent.
critical_bugs.impact: Cannot test Add Item 'Save' button rename. Unable to verify button text change from 'Save all' to 'Save' across languages.

passed_tests: Login flow works correctly with dev@dressapp.io credentials
Identity accordion found with correct data-testid='profile-accordion-identity'
Save button found with correct data-testid='profile-details-save-btn'
Save button is initially disabled (TEST 1a partial verification)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL BLOCKERS: 1) Profile first name input (data-testid='profile-field-first_name' or id='f-first') is not rendering in the Identity accordion - verify the input field exists and has correct selectors. 2) /add route is inaccessible and redirects to /home - verify route configuration and any guards/prerequisites. Both issues prevent complete testing of the requested features.

success_percentage.frontend: 20% - Login and navigation work, but both primary test features are blocked by critical issues
